reviews.comment:
Peeesimo sistema, se hace transito en la estacion de servicio, lo que no solo hace dificil cargar nafta, si no que si queres parar a comprarte un cafecito tambien se re complica en estacionar. Mejor ahorrarse la parada y cargar nafta en otro lado

(Translated by Google)
Terrible system. There's so much traffic at the gas station, which not only makes filling up difficult, but also makes parking a nightmare if you want to stop for a coffee. It's better to save yourself the trouble and fill up somewhere else.

reviews.comment:
El lugar lindo y muy prolijo. Ahora la atencion de los empleados impresentables!! En el menu no estaban los precios. Nos cobraron segun la cara y la hamburguesa con un pan viejo de sabor rancio.

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice and very tidy. However, the staff's service was terrible! The prices weren't on the menu. They charged us based on our appearance, and the burger came with stale, rancid-tasting bread.

reviews.comment:

Terrible service from the shop staff, 3 employees, only the beginner was helping, and she was doing what she could; the other two seemed to be on vacation.
